summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of product page layouts (QuickBuy, Wizard, Application, Showcase, Classic), admin CSS variable fixes, and new Service Detail Page tile in Admin > Auth & Pages. All critical features verified via live UI testing + code review.

issues: Toggle switch uses hardcoded bg-[#0f172a] instead of CSS variable - admin is light-mode only so low impact
FormTile uses border-slate-200, bg-white; SectionDivider uses bg-slate-100 - hardcoded Tailwind colors. Not in current audit scope but could affect dark mode admin components outside AuthTile/Field.

critical_code_review_comments: websiteTabShared.tsx: FormTile, SectionDivider, BaseCurrencyWidget, OrgAddressSection still use hardcoded Tailwind colors (slate-*). Out of scope for this PR but flagged for future dark-mode hardening.
ProductForm.tsx: Toggle switch uses `bg-[#0f172a]` hardcoded hex - minor, admin panel is always light mode.
All layout files confirmed to use CSS variables (var(--aa-primary), var(--aa-card), var(--aa-border), var(--aa-text), var(--aa-muted)) - no hardcoded blue-600 found.
No slice(0,4) limit found in new QuickBuyLayout - all intake questions displayed.
WizardLayout progress bar: Math.round((currentStep / (totalSteps - 1)) * 100) - 0% at step 0, 100% at review step. Correct.
WizardLayout boolean display: case-insensitive using .toLowerCase() - yes/YES/Yes all display 'Yes'. Correct.
All 4 layout files + ClassicLayout use formatCurrency from shared utils.
All 4 layout files + ClassicLayout use useWebsite() for sdp_* labels.
All 4 layout files use ReactMarkdown for custom sections.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 'Sample Service1' product (showcase layout)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test environment has 1 product 'Sample Service1' using Showcase layout (display_layout: showcase). Only showcase layout can be live-tested. Wizard, Application, QuickBuy layouts verified via code review only. Admin flow: partner code 'automate-accounts' -> email+password login -> expand SETTINGS in sidebar -> Auth & Pages -> App Pages inner tab. Service Detail Page tile has data-testid='auth-tile-service-detail'. All 18 sdp_* fields present in slide panel.

live_test_results.showcase_layout: PASS - hero section, 2-column layout (content + calculator), live price update works
live_test_results.section_labels_from_useWebsite: PASS - About this product, Key Features, Configure & Price, Adjust options, FAQs all use sdp_* defaults
live_test_results.faq_expandable: PASS - click Q1 shows A1 answer
live_test_results.live_price_recalculation: PASS - Yes selection changed Total from CA$99 to CA$109 (CA$10 add-on)
live_test_results.admin_tiles_css_variables: PASS (code review) - AuthTile uses var(--aa-card), var(--aa-border), var(--aa-text), var(--aa-muted)
live_test_results.field_component_css_variables: PASS (code review) - Field input uses CSS variable styling
live_test_results.reactmarkdown_custom_sections: PASS - custom section content rendered correctly in showcase
live_test_results.formatCurrency_all_layouts: PASS (code review) - all layouts import from shared utils

code_review_results.quickbuy_no_slice_limit: PASS - no slice(0,4) in new QuickBuyLayout
code_review_results.application_4_sections: PASS - Overview, Application Form, Pricing, FAQs sections present
code_review_results.showcase_hero_calculator: PASS - hero + right-side Configure & Price panel
